description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a ventilated rib and a tubular magazine beneath. The stock and fore-end are made of dark wood, providing a classic and sturdy appearance, while the receiver and barrel are finished in matte black metal. The shotgun has a full stock with a straight comb and a slightly angled butt, designed for shoulder firing. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. The pump mechanism is visible as a ribbed section beneath the barrel, allowing for manual cycling of the action. Overall, the design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for both defensive and sporting use in urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a dark wood stock and fore-end, matte black metal barrel, and a ribbed pump mechanism beneath the barrel. The design is classic and functional, with a rounded trigger guard and full stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, ribbed pump, and barrel with a ventilated rib.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, tubular magazine below, and the narrow profile of the stock and fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and pump mechanism.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a ventilated rib and tubular magazine beneath
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
